arts.ttl: Ola Aina shows how fine margins are keeping Forest in the top four
arts.sum: In fact, Everton are the only team whose players have earned more points through goalline clearances in the Premier League this season (six) than Aina. As Nottingham Forest fly high in the league, Ali Tweedale of Opta Analyst takes a closer look at how Ola Aina's pivotal performances have played a key role in their incredible form this season.

arts.ttl: The Big Question: How did Bournemouth v Forest become a top-four battle?
arts.sum: Football writer Ben Bloom compares the contrasting styles that have taken two former Championship clubs into the Premier League's top seven. Bournemouth have not tasted defeat for 10 league matches and find themselves only one point behind fifth place, a position that looks highly likely to bring Champions League football next campaign.
